summary: Ship an observation receipt graph CLI + schema that links plans, claims, memory, bus logs, and receipts.

steps.title: Capture requirements and sources
steps.notes: Summarised the queue brief + teof scan output to pin down traversal scope, CLI ergonomics, schema elements, and receipts expectations.

steps.title: Design schema and CLI skeleton
steps.notes: Schema and CLI stubs live under tools.observation.receipt_graph + tests/test_receipt_graph.py.

steps.title: Implement traversal + receipts
steps.notes: Graph builder links bus events + memory/log entries, emits run receipts/pointers, and documentation teaches operators how to replay the lineage; next iteration will add schema docs.

checkpoint.description: Graph CLI emits validated receipts and documentation teaches agents how to replay task lineage.
